headline: McKesson (MCK) CEO Sells Shares As Company Names A New Strategy Chief
summary: McKesson (NYSE:MCK) disclosed a significant insider sale by its CEO, executed under a pre arranged trading plan. The company also announced the retirement of a key executive and the immediate appointment of a new Chief Strategy Officer. These management moves come alongside an updated company outlook and revised growth targets. McKesson is a major healthcare services and distribution company that connects drug manufacturers, pharmacies, providers, and payers across the supply chain. Insider...
